subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enkindled with the fire of the love of God! Thy letter was received and its contents brought joy. It is evidence of thy devotion [3.5s]... ...Whensoever a company of people shall gather in a meeting place, shall engage in glorifying God
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مشتعل بنار محبت الله نامه شما رسید و از مضمون سرور حاصل گردید دلیل بر توجه
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @permission for visit; pilgrimage
